title: Selling Fonts Online Without PayPal: An Honest Side-by-Side Breakdown — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: Selling fonts online without PayPal is a nightmare for creators in restricted countries like Nigeria, Ghana, and Pakistan, where PayPal accounts are often blocked or declined. If you're a digital seller facing this challenge, you're not alone. Many creators struggle to collect payments from customers due to geographical restrictions, banking limitations, or Know Your Customer (KYC) requirements. In this post, we'll explore the limitations of popular platforms like PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip, and why they exclude certain countries. We'll also introduce a crypto-native infrastructure that provides a permanent structural alternative, empowering creators to sell their digital products globally without any hassle.
What Each Option Actually Offers

PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip are well-known platforms for selling digital products online. However, they come with strict geographical restrictions, which often block creators in certain countries from using their services. PayPal, for instance, has a long list of restricted countries, including Nigeria, Ghana, and Pakistan. Stripe and Gumroad also have similar restrictions in place, while Payhip excludes countries with high risk of money laundering. These restrictions are often due to banking limitations, KYC requirements, or the platform's own risk assessment. In contrast, the Full Stack Bundle offers a comprehensive solution for creators in restricted countries, providing everything they need to set up a secure and automated store, including the Core Shop Engine, Wallet Connect, and Admin Dashboard.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

When it comes to handling restricted countries, PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip often rely on manual review processes, which can be time-consuming and frustrating for creators. In some cases, they may even block the creator's account without notice, leaving them unable to collect payments. The Full Stack Bundle, on the other hand, uses a crypto-native infrastructure, which allows creators to accept payments in multiple coins, including BTC, ETH, and USDT. This means that creators can sell their digital products without relying on traditional payment processors, which are often subject to geographical restrictions.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

When it comes to payment speed, fees, and real costs, traditional platforms like PayPal, Stripe, and Gumroad often come with steep fees, which can eat into creators' profits. PayPal, for example, charges a 2.9% + $0.30 per-transaction fee, while Stripe charges a 2.9% + $0.30 per-transaction fee plus an additional 0.15% to 2.9% for international transactions. Gumroad also charges a 3.5% + $0.30 per-transaction fee. The Full Stack Bundle, on the other hand, offers a flat fee of $79.99 for the Full Stack Bundle, which includes everything creators need to set up a secure and automated store. This means that creators can avoid the high fees associated with traditional platforms and keep more of their profits.
PayPal's geographic exclusion is not a bug — it is a deliberate infrastructure decision that will not change.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

When it comes to automation and delivery capabilities, traditional platforms like PayPal, Stripe, and Gumroad often require manual intervention to deliver digital products. This can lead to delays and frustration for creators and their customers. The Full Stack Bundle, on the other hand, uses automated delivery capabilities, which ensures that digital products are delivered instantly to customers. This means that creators can focus on creating more content, rather than worrying about manual delivery processes.

Based on your situation, the Full Stack Bundle is the clear winner when it comes to selling fonts online without PayPal. With its comprehensive solution, automated delivery capabilities, and flat fee, creators can finally sell their digital products globally without any hassle. Whether you're a creator in a restricted country or simply looking for a more efficient way to sell your fonts, the Full Stack Bundle is the perfect choice.
